title: diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. alpinum
intro: Diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. alpinum, also known as the alpine forked polypody, is a subspecies of the forked polypody plant, which belongs to the family Lycopodiaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs due to its expectorant properties. The alpine forked polypody has been used to provide relief from various health issues, including inflammation and fever, thanks to its anti-inflammatory and antipyretic properties. Diphasiastrum complanatum subsp. alpinum is often prepared as a decoction or infusion, and it can also be used in the form of a salve or ointment for topical application.
